items.title: Why Free Starlink Wi-Fi Is Rewiring the Long-Haul Cabin
items.dek: Low-earth-orbit satellites are turning in-flight Wi-Fi from a slow, paywalled extra into a fast, free perk. Qatar Airways leads the Gulf shift; here is the tech behind it.

items.title: How Changi's Passport-Free Lanes Reset the Biometric Bar
items.dek: Singapore Changi clears travellers on face and iris alone. Here is how token-free biometrics work, what they speed up, and where a passport is still required.

items.title: Inside Asia's Push to Modernise Crowded Airspace

items.title: Boeing 777X Flies First Production-Configured Jet in Certification Push

items.title: ETOPS Explained: How Twin-Jets Cross Oceans Safely
